summary: Iteration 2 testing of Du' Spicci backend (Supabase-backed jobs) + frontend (37 quartieri, filter, Mancia modal). 9/9 backend checks passed. Frontend login → board → filter Parioli (5→2 cards) → Offro form with 38-option dropdown → submit Trastevere job → auto-switched back to Cerco with new ad at index 0 → Mancia modal with 4 tip options → apply tip=2 → success toast with Italian Mancia copy. Two minor non-blocking findings noted.
passed: GET /api/jobs returns 4 seeded rows from Supabase (HTTP 200)
GET /api/jobs?neighborhood=Tutti behaves same as no filter (4 rows)
POST /api/jobs with invalid quartiere ('FakeQuartiere') returns 400 'Quartiere non valido'
POST /api/jobs with auth + valid body returns 200 JobOut and persists to Supabase; new ad appears at index 0 sorted DESC by created_at
POST /api/jobs/{id}/apply with tip=2 returns ok=true, message contains 'Mancia opzionale: 2€ (sblocca priorità Spicci Pro)', tip=2
POST /api/jobs/{id}/apply with tip=0 returns ok=true, message does NOT contain 'Mancia opzionale'
Frontend login (test@duspicci.it / test1234) lands on board (data-testid=board-page)
data-testid='filter-neighborhood' is a <select> with 38 options ('Tutti i quartieri' + 37 quartieri)
Selecting Parioli in filter reduces visible job-cards from 5 to 2
Toggle Offro reveals data-testid='neighborhood-select' with 38 options including Trastevere
Submit Offro form auto-switches back to Cerco; new ad 'Frontend test Trastevere' appears at index 0
Clicking 'Mi Candido' opens data-testid='mancia-modal' with 4 tip options (tip-0, tip-1, tip-2, tip-5)
Choosing tip-2 + confirm-apply posts /api/jobs/{id}/apply and shows success toast 'Candidatura inviata a Tester! Mancia opzionale: 2€ (sblocca priorità Spicci Pro).'

failed.issue: Review request expected an 'Appena pubblicato' text ring/badge on the new ad after Offro submit. The visual orange ring is present on the just-published card (visible in screenshot), but the literal text string 'Appena pubblicato' was not found anywhere in the DOM (count=0). Either the copy is implemented differently or the text label is missing.
failed.evidence: page.locator('text=Appena pubblicato').count() === 0 after publishing 'Frontend test Trastevere'; visual ring is rendered correctly.

failed.area: frontend - data-testid naming for job cards / apply buttons
failed.issue: Review request referenced selectors like [data-testid^='job-card-'] and [data-testid^='apply-button-']. Actual DOM uses bare 'job-card' / 'apply-button' (repeated, no index suffix). Tests still pass via .nth() but querying a specific card by id is not currently possible.
failed.evidence: All data-testids on board: ['board-page','logout-button','mode-toggle','toggle-cerco','toggle-offro','filter-neighborhood','job-list','job-card','job-card-price','apply-button', ...] (job-card / apply-button each repeated 6x with no suffix).

action_items: Optional: append job id to per-card testids (e.g. data-testid={`job-card-${id}`} and data-testid={`apply-button-${id}`}) so individual cards can be targeted in tests.
Optional: if the 'Appena pubblicato' text badge is intended, ensure the literal string is rendered (currently only the orange highlight ring is visible).
